subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant who hath turned toward Thee and hath forsaken all else besides Thee, and hath soared in the atmosphere of Thy yearning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی هذا عبدک الذی اقبل الیک و اعرض عن سوائک و طار فی هوآء شوقک و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause
